class.name: LunariLanguageServer
class.brief_description: Lunari text-document and workspace service for editor/LSP-style tooling.
class.description: Tracks open Lunari documents and exposes diagnostics, document links, document symbols, workspace symbols, completion and completion-item resolve, signature help, native symbol inspection, references, definition, rename, hover, and workspace snapshot payloads shaped for language-server clients.

method.name: initialize
method.description: Returns Lunari language-server capabilities using the same LSP-shaped provider objects as Godot's GDScript language server where Lunari currently supports the surface. Text documents advertise full-document sync with open/close and save options. Completion advertises resolve support and the trigger characters [code].[/code], [code]$[/code], [code]'[/code], and [code]"[/code]. Signature help advertises [code]([/code] and [code],[/code] triggers. Rename advertises prepare support, document links advertise no resolve step, and unsupported providers are emitted as explicit [code]false[/code] or empty provider objects.

method.name: did_open
method.description: Opens and stores the full source for a [code]textDocument.uri[/code].

method.name: did_change
method.description: Updates the stored source from a full-document content change.

method.name: did_close
method.description: Removes an open document from the service workspace.

method.name: get_open_documents
method.description: Returns the currently tracked open document sources by normalized resource path.

method.name: get_workspace_cache_stats
method.description: Returns diagnostic counters for service-owned workspace caches, including document-snapshot, completion, signature-help, references, symbol-index, and diagnostics hit/miss counts, validity, fingerprint lengths, cached document count, cached completion item count, cached signature count, cached reference count, cached symbol count, and cached diagnostic count.

method.name: get_workspace_snapshot
method.description: Aggregates the open workspace into the same LSP-style snapshot payload exposed by [method LunariScript.get_lsp_workspace_snapshot], including diagnostics, workspace symbols, completion, signature help, definition, references, rename readiness, and hover metadata for the requested cursor position.

method.name: publish_diagnostics
method.description: Returns diagnostics for the requested open document.

method.name: workspace_diagnostics
method.description: Returns workspace diagnostics for project [code].lu[/code] files plus open documents, with open documents overriding disk contents.

method.name: document_symbol
method.description: Returns document symbols for the requested open document, with path and URI metadata suitable for LSP clients.

method.name: completion
method.description: Returns LSP-shaped completion items at the requested document position, reusing the service completion cache while the workspace and cursor prefix are unchanged.

method.name: completion_resolve
method.description: Resolves a completion item with documentation and detail metadata.

method.name: document_link
method.description: Returns clickable document links for existing Lunari script and resource string literals.

method.name: workspace_symbol
method.description: Returns filtered workspace symbols for Lunari files in the project plus open documents, including LSP-style location metadata.

method.name: signature_help
method.description: Returns LSP-shaped signature help at the requested document position, reusing the service signature-help cache while the workspace and cursor offset are unchanged.

method.name: native_symbol
method.description: Returns native Godot class or member metadata for [code]native_class[/code] and an optional [code]member[/code]. Object-derived classes are resolved through Godot's native class API snapshot, while built-in Variant types such as [code]Color[/code] are resolved through Godot's native Variant metadata and report [code]source = "variant_api"[/code].

method.name: references
method.description: Returns cursor-anchored references across the open workspace, reusing the service references cache while the workspace and anchor symbol position are unchanged.

method.name: prepare_rename
method.description: Returns whether the selected symbol can be renamed, plus placeholder, range, reference count, and declaration metadata when available.

method.name: rename
method.description: Returns renamed file contents and LSP-style document changes for the selected symbol.

method.name: definition
method.description: Returns the cursor-anchored symbol definition across the open workspace, including resolved receiver/member definitions when available.

method.name: hover
method.description: Returns structured hover metadata for the cursor-anchored symbol, including resolved workspace member definitions when available.
